messages.content:
You are a HoloVerify worker. Preserve state. Obey Gov.
Workers receive Gov twice: a routing lens near the top and the full latest baton near the end.
Source context is ground truth. The state brief preserves continuity. The final baton controls the next action.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

prompt_object.current_turn_command: Act under the baton. Return compact JSON only. If state and Gov conflict, flag the conflict in open_blockers.

blocked_moves: treating any single record as conclusive without exact match
approving release despite open destination blocker
expanding license scope without documented authorization
dependency_ledger: Unresolved: destination alignment. End user (Andes Labs) matches. ECCN (3A991) matches. Shipment date (2026-06-28) matches license effective date. Only destination scope (Chile vs Peru) remains open. License effective date timing confirms license is active before export.
full_latest_gov_baton.gov_command: Diagnose previous worker output, preserve correct source bindings, repair gate failures, block invalid moves, and create the next worker baton.
full_latest_gov_baton.model_constraint_respected: gov does not choose models; next worker selected via routing protocol
must_preserve: exact ECCN/destination/end-user/date match requirement per STD-SIE-073-P
WARN-SIE-073 requirement for precise license evidence
destination scope authority must match shipment record exactly
end user Andes Labs match is correct across records
ECCN 3A991 match is correct across records
must_repair: destination mismatch: SHIP-SIE-073 lists Chile, LIC-SIE-073 authorizes only Peru
source boundary remains open until destination alignment is confirmed

next_worker_baton.attack_focus: Identify authoritative source for correct destination: (1) shipment record error requiring correction, (2) license scope error requiring amendment, (3) additional license covering Chile that was not yet consulted, or (4) verify whether license holder has blanket authority for multiple destinations. Cross-reference all four source documents for any explicit destination clarification.
monotonic_preservation: preserve exact-match requirement for all five fields (ECCN, destination, end user, shipment date, license effective date)
preserve WARN-SIE-073 guidance against relying on product family alone
preserve STD-SIE-073-P requirement that controlled export is complete only when license evidence exactly matches shipment parameters
next_worker_baton.objective: Resolve destination mismatch between SHIP-SIE-073 (Chile) and LIC-SIE-073 (Peru) to close source-boundary
required_repairs: reconcile destination discrepancy using authoritative source records
confirm whether Andes Labs is authorized to receive shipment in Chile under any existing license
obtain corrected documentation if error is identified
maintain strict exact-match requirement throughout repair

full_latest_gov_baton.source_gate_interpretation: Destination mismatch between shipment (Chile) and license (Peru) requires resolution through repair worker. Worker correctly escalated; deterministic gates passed. Source-boundary remains open.

gov_routing_lens.main_repair_target: destination mismatch: SHIP-SIE-073 lists Chile, LIC-SIE-073 authorizes only Peru
gov_routing_lens.unresolved_dependency: Unresolved: destination alignment. End user (Andes Labs) matches. ECCN (3A991) matches. Shipment date (2026-06-28) matches license effective date. Only destination scope (Chile vs Peru) remains open. License effective date timing confirms license is active before export.

boundary_binding.action_boundary: May logistics release the controlled export shipment?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact match; destination Chile vs Peru blocks closure
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: LIC-SIE-073 destination Peru does not match SHIP-SIE-073 Chile
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Narrow defect remains open: license destination fails to match shipment record
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: License effective date matches but destination scope fails

worker_output.final_answer: Source boundary remains open. Shipment SHIP-SIE-073 lists destination Chile while LIC-SIE-073 authorizes only Peru. Policy STD-SIE-073-P requires exact destination match before release. WARN-SIE-073 reinforces need for precise evidence. Action must escalate until destination alignment is confirmed in source records.

action.description: May logistics release the controlled export shipment?

context.action_boundary: May logistics release the controlled export shipment?
context.anomaly_observed: A broad dual-use warning remains visible, while export license evidence may exactly match the current shipment.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Shipment SHIP-SIE-073 exports ECCN 3A991 sensor array to Chile for end user Andes Labs on 2026-06-28.
Dual-use warning WARN-SIE-073 says similar sensor arrays require exact license evidence and should not rely on product family alone.
Export license LIC-SIE-073 covers ECCN 3A991 sensor array, destination Peru, end user Andes Labs, shipment date 2026-06-28, effective before export.

policy_documents.content: Controlled export is complete only when export license evidence matches ECCN, destination, end user, shipment date, and license effective date before export.
policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy

source_rules: ALLOW only when exact current source boundary is closed before execution
ESCALATE when a narrow source-record defect remains open before execution
task_and_answer_contract.task: Decide whether the action may proceed using only source records in this packet.
